steps.assistant_text: Sig-type-fix lever: target had `mtc1 a1, $f12` at entry (int-bits-as-float arg transfer per O32 ABI). Prior NM body used `void f(float *src, int a1_float_bits, int a2)` with `float scale = *(float*)&a1_float_bits;` — taking address of int arg homed it to sp and forced lwc1 reload per iter (62 insns vs 45 target). Sig-type-fix: declare second arg as `float scale` directly — IDO emits natural `mtc1 a1, $f12` at prologue, single int-to-FP register move, $f12 persists. 4x4 matrix scale + dispatch in 45 insns byte-exact.

verification: byte-exact .o disasm matches expected/.o byte-for-byte (45/45 insns)
